### REQUEST ###

```
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED

Connection: close

Content-Type: application/proto

X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.12
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED

X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Fs-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true

X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "tests/test_flow_tracker.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for flow keying, directionality, byte accounting.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import (\r\n    _normalize_key,\r\n    FlowTracker,\r\n)\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_flow_id\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_flow_key_normalization():\r\n    \"\"\"Same flow from either direction yields same key.\"\"\"\r\n    a = _normalize_key(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80)\r\n    b = _normalize_key(\"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000)\r\n    assert a == b\r\n    assert a == (( \"192.168.1.1\", 80), (\"192.168.1.100\", 45000))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_flow_id_stable():\r\n    \"\"\"flow_id is deterministic for same 5-tuple and capture_file_id.\"\"\"\r\n    id1 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    id2 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    assert id1 == id2\r\n    id3 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    assert id1 == id3\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_byte_accounting():\r\n    \"\"\"FlowTracker counts bytes per direction correctly.\"\"\"\r\n    tracker = FlowTracker(capture_file_id=\"test\", flow_idle_timeout_sec=300)\r\n    # SYN from client (ts, src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port, ...)\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.0, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1000, 0x02))\r\n    # SYN-ACK from server\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.01, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, b\"\", 2000, 0x12))\r\n    # ACK from client\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.02, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1001, 0x10))\r\n    # Data client -> server (10 bytes)\r\n    out = list(tracker.ingest(1000.03, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"1234567890\", 1001, 0x18))\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # Data server -> client (5 bytes) + FIN server\r\n    out = list(tracker.ingest(1000.04, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, b\"hello\", 2001, 0x11))\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # FIN client\r\n    out = list(tracker.ingest(1000.05, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1011, 0x11))\r\n    assert len(out) == 1\r\n    flow, segments = out[0]\r\n    assert flow.bytes_client_to_server == 10\r\n    assert flow.bytes_server_to_client == 5\r\n    assert flow.client_ip == \"192.168.1.100\"\r\n    assert flow.server_ip == \"192.168.1.1\"\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:17:25 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "tests/test_flow_tracker.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for flow keying, directionality, byte accounting.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import (\r\n    _normalize_key,\r\n    FlowTracker,\r\n)\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_flow_id\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_flow_key_normalization():\r\n    \"\"\"Same flow from either direction yields same key.\"\"\"\r\n    a = _normalize_key(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80)\r\n    b = _normalize_key(\"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000)\r\n    assert a == b\r\n    assert a == (( \"192.168.1.1\", 80), (\"192.168.1.100\", 45000))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_flow_id_stable():\r\n    \"\"\"flow_id is deterministic for same 5-tuple and capture_file_id.\"\"\"\r\n    id1 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    id2 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    assert id1 == id2\r\n    id3 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    assert id1 == id3\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_byte_accounting():\r\n    \"\"\"FlowTracker counts bytes per direction correctly.\"\"\"\r\n    tracker = FlowTracker(capture_file_id=\"test\", flow_idle_timeout_sec=300)\r\n    # SYN from client (ts, src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port, ...)\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.0, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1000, 0x02))\r\n    # SYN-ACK from server\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.01, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, b\"\", 2000, 0x12))\r\n    # ACK from client\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.02, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1001, 0x10))\r\n    # Data client -> server (10 bytes)\r\n    out = list(tracker.ingest(1000.03, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"1234567890\", 1001, 0x18))\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # Data server -> client (5 bytes) + FIN server\r\n    out = list(tracker.ingest(1000.04, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, b\"hello\", 2001, 0x11))\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # FIN client\r\n    out = list(tracker.ingest(1000.05, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1011, 0x11))\r\n    assert len(out) == 1\r\n    flow, segments = out[0]\r\n    assert flow.bytes_client_to_server == 10\r\n    assert flow.bytes_server_to_client == 5\r\n    assert flow.client_ip == \"192.168.1.100\"\r\n    assert flow.server_ip == \"192.168.1.1\"\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```
